DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "CARTWIGHT) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT LOTHER DETERMANN AS AN INDIVIDUAL, TO SERVE FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT ON SEPTEMBER 12, 2023, DEFENDANT LOTHER DETERMANN, AS AN INDIVIDUAL SERVED AMENDED VERIFIED RESPONSES WHICH MAKE THE MOTION MOOT. Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
ANTHONY C. CHIOSSO, ESQ., THE LAW OFFICES OF ANTHONY CHIOSSO, (415) 964-1321, tony@chiossolaw.com, Attorneys for Plaintiff EMILY CARTWRIGHT.
RONALD M. STEWART, ESQ., BENNETT, GELINI & GELINI, 510-444-7688 rstewart@bsralaw.com, Attorneys for Defendants LOTHAR DETERMANN; ET AL

All parties stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Renne hearing today's motion.

Hearing is held. argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Lothar Determann, Trustee Of The Lothar Determann Living Trust To Plaintiffs Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary

PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "CARTWIGHT) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT LOTHER DETERMANN, TRUSTEE OF THE LOTHER DETERMANN LIVING TRUST TO SERVE FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT ON SEPTEMBER 12, 2023, DEFENDANT LOTHER DETERMANN, TRUSTEE SERVED AMENDED VERIFIED RESPONSES WHICH MAKE THE MOTION MOOT.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com in compliance with CRC 3.1312 (Approval as to Form)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

RONALD M. STEWART, ESQ., BENNETT, GELINI & GELINI, 510-444-7688 rstewart@bsralaw.com, Attorneys for Defendants LOTHAR DETERMANN; ET AL

All parties stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Renne hearing today's motion.

Hearing is held. argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Joanne Horneff, Dba Property Management Systems To Plaintiffs Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions

PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "CARTWIGHT) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT JOANNE HORNEFF DBA AS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS TO SERVE FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED.

THE NOTICE OF MOTION MISIDENTIFIED THE DEFENDANT TO WHOM IT WAS DIRECTED. IT SHOULD HAVE BEEN DIRECTED TO MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS. IN SPITE OF THIS MISDIRECTION IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT ON SEPTEMBER 12 2023, DEFENDANT MICHELLE RNEFF DBA PTOPRTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS SERVED AMENDED VERIFIED RESPONSES WHICH MAKE THE MOTION MOOT.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com in copmliance with CRC 3.1312 (Approval as to Form)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

4 - PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Joanne Horneff, An Individual To Plaintiffs Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions

PLAINTIFF EMILY CARTWRIGHT'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "CARTWIGHT) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT JOANNE HORNEFF TO SERVE FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR MONETERY SANCTIONS AGAINT THE FOUR NAMED DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. THE AMOUNTS SOUGHT ARE UNREASONABLE AND UNJUSTDIFIED BY THE RECORD.
